name: Hubei Sanxia New Building Materials Co., Ltd.
summary: Hubei Sanxia New Building Materials Co., Ltd. engages in the research, production, and sale of float glass, glass deep-processing products, and building materials in China. It offers titanium dioxide film self-cleaning, tempered, laminated, and insulating glasses, as well as reinforced glass covers. The company is based in Dangyang, China.
